## Register a New User

Registers a new user account in the system.

**Method:** `POST`  
**URL:** `{{base_url}}/register`

---

### Request Body

The request body should be sent as **raw JSON** with the following fields:

| Field | Type | **Required** | Description | **Rules** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | string | Yes | The display name of the new user | Min 2 chars, Max 255 chars |
| `email` | string | Yes | The email address of the new user | Valid email, Must be unique |
| `password` | string | Yes | The password for the new account | Min 8 characters |

**Example:**

``` json
{
  "name": "PrasadD",
  "email": "prasadD@example.com",
  "password": "password123"
}

 ```

---

### Response

| Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `201 Created` | User created successfully |

A successful response will return a `200` or `201` status code indicating the user has been registered.

### EXAMPLE RESPONSE (201):

``` json
    "status": true,
    "message": "User registered successfully",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Prasad Datir",
        "email": "prasad@example.com"
    }
}

 ```

### ERROR RESPONSES:

| **Status Code** | **Description** |
| --- | --- |
| 422 | Validation failed (invalid email, weak password etc) |
| 500 | Server error |

# 🔐 Login

Authenticates a registered user and returns a Sanctum access token.

---

## 📌 Endpoint

| Method | URL |
| --- | --- |
| `POST` | `{{base_url}}/login` |

---

## 📥 Request Body

> Content-Type: `application/json` 
  

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `email` | string | ✅ Yes | Registered email address |
| `password` | string | ✅ Yes | Account password (min 8 chars) |

### Example Request

``` json
{
    "email": "prasad@example.com",
    "password": "password123"
}

 ```

---

## 📤 Response

### ✅ Success (200 OK)

``` json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "User logged in successfully",
    "token": "1|laravel_sanctum_token_here",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Prasad Datir",
        "email": "prasad@example.com"
    }
}

 ```

---

## ❌ Error Responses

| Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `401` | Invalid credentials |
| `422` | Validation failed |
| `500` | Server error |

### 422 Validation Error Example

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Validation failed",
    "errors": {
        "email": ["The email field is required."],
        "password": ["The password field is required."]
    }
}

 ```

### 401 Unauthorized Example

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Invalid credentials"
}

 ```

---

## 🔑 Auto Token Script

After a successful login the **Tests** tab script automatically  
extracts the token from the response and saves it to the  
`{{token}}` environment variable.

This token is then automatically used in all subsequent  
authenticated requests via the collection-level Bearer Token auth.

``` javascript
const response = pm.response.json();
if (response.token) {
    pm.environment.set("token", response.token);
    console.log("✅ Token saved: " + response.token);
}

 ```

---

## 📝 Notes

- Token expires when user logs out
    
- Include token in all authenticated requests as `Bearer {{token}}`
    
- Each login generates a new token

## 🔓 Logout

Invalidates the authenticated user's current access token and ends the session.

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL |
| --- | --- |
| `POST` | `{{base_url}}/logout` |

---

### 🔐 Authentication

Requires a valid Bearer token.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

 ```

---

### Request Body

No request body required.

---

### ✅ Success Response

**Status Code:** `200 OK`

``` json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Logged out successfully.",
    "data": null
}

 ```

---

### ❌ Error Responses

| Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `401` | Unauthenticated — token missing or invalid |
| `500` | Internal server error |

**401 Unauthenticated:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**500 Internal Server Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Something went wrong.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

---

### 📝 Notes

- This endpoint uses Laravel Sanctum's `currentAccessToken()->delete()` to revoke only the current token.
    
- After logout, the token is immediately invalidated and cannot be reused.
    
- To fully log out from all devices, a separate "logout from all devices" endpoint would be needed.

## ✏️ Update Board

Updates the details of an existing board. Only the board creator or a `manager` can update a board.

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL |
| --- | --- |
| `PUT` | `{{base_url}}/boards/{{board_id}}` |

---

### 🔐 Authentication

Requires a valid Bearer token.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

 ```

**Required Role:** `manager`

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `board_id` | integer | The unique ID of the board to update |

---

### Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description | Validation Rules |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | string | ✅ Yes | The updated name of the board | `required`, `string`, `max:255` |
| `description` | string | ❌ No | Updated description of the board | `nullable`, `string` |

**Example Request Body:**

``` json
{
    "name": "Product Launch Q3 - Updated",
    "description": "Updated board for tracking Q3 product launch tasks and milestones."
}

 ```

---

### ✅ Success Response

**Status Code:** `200 OK`

``` json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Board updated successfully.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Product Launch Q3 - Updated",
        "description": "Updated board for tracking Q3 product launch tasks and milestones.",
        "created_by": 3,
        "created_at": "2025-07-15T09:30:00.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2025-07-15T11:00:00.000000Z"
    }
}

 ```

---

### ❌ Error Responses

| Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `401` | Unauthenticated — token missing or invalid |
| `403` | Forbidden — user does not have the `manager` role |
| `404` | Board not found |
| `422` | Validation error — required fields missing or invalid |
| `500` | Internal server error |

**401 Unauthenticated:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**403 Forbidden:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "You do not have permission to perform this action.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**422 Validation Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Validation failed.",
    "errors": {
        "name": ["The name field is required."]
    }
}

 ```

**500 Internal Server Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Something went wrong.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

---

### 📝 Notes

- Only the board's creator or a user with the `manager` role can update the board.
    
- Partial updates are not supported — provide all required fields.
    
- The `updated_at` timestamp is automatically refreshed on every update.

## 📋 Create Board

Creates a new board for the authenticated user.

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL |
| --- | --- |
| `POST` | `{{base_url}}/boards` |

---

### 🔐 Authentication

Requires a valid Bearer token.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

 ```

---

### Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description | Validation Rules |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `name` | string | ✅ Yes | The name of the board | `required`, `string`, `max:255` |
| `description` | string | ❌ No | A brief description of the board | `nullable`, `string` |

**Example Request Body:**

``` json
{
    "name": "Product Launch Q3",
    "description": "Board for tracking all tasks related to the Q3 product launch campaign."
}

 ```

---

### ✅ Success Response

**Status Code:** `201 Created`

``` json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Board created successfully.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Product Launch Q3",
        "description": "Board for tracking all tasks related to the Q3 product launch campaign.",
        "created_by": 3,
        "created_at": "2025-07-15T09:30:00.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2025-07-15T09:30:00.000000Z"
    }
}

 ```

---

### ❌ Error Responses

| Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `401` | Unauthenticated — token missing or invalid |
| `422` | Validation error — required fields missing or invalid |
| `500` | Internal server error |

**401 Unauthenticated:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**422 Validation Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Validation failed.",
    "errors": {
        "name": ["The name field is required."]
    }
}

 ```

**500 Internal Server Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Something went wrong.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

---

### 📝 Notes

- The `created_by` field is automatically set to the authenticated user's ID.
    
- Board names should be unique per user to avoid confusion.
    
- The authenticated user gets added as a board member with role manager.

| `GET` | `{{base_url}}/boards` |

---

### 🔐 Authentication

```

 ```

---

### Request Body

No request body required.

---

### ✅ Success Response

**Status Code:** `200 OK`

``` json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Boards retrieved successfully.",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "name": "Product Launch Q3",
            "description": "Board for tracking all tasks related to the Q3 product launch.",
            "created_by": 3,
            "created_at": "2025-07-15T09:30:00.000000Z",
            "updated_at": "2025-07-15T09:30:00.000000Z"
        },
        {
            "id": 2,
            "name": "Engineering Roadmap",
            "description": "Tracks all engineering milestones for the current quarter.",
            "created_by": 3,
            "created_at": "2025-07-16T10:00:00.000000Z",
            "updated_at": "2025-07-16T10:00:00.000000Z"
        }
    ]
}

 ```

---

### ❌ Error Responses

| Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `401` | Unauthenticated — token missing or invalid |
| `500` | Internal server error |

**401 Unauthenticated:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**500 Internal Server Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Something went wrong.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

---

### 📝 Notes

- Returns only boards that the authenticated user has access to (either as creator or member).
    
- Results may be paginated in production environments.
    
- An empty array `[]` is returned if no boards exist.

## 🔍 Get A Board

Retrieves the details of a specific board by its ID.

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL |
| --- | --- |
| `GET` | `{{base_url}}/boards/{{board_id}}` |

---

### 🔐 Authentication

Requires a valid Bearer token.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

 ```

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `board_id` | integer | The unique ID of the board to retrieve |

---

### Request Body

No request body required.

---

### ✅ Success Response

**Status Code:** `200 OK`

``` json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Board retrieved successfully.",
    "data": {
        "id": 1,
        "name": "Product Launch Q3",
        "description": "Board for tracking all tasks related to the Q3 product launch.",
        "created_by": 3,
        "members": [
            {
                "id": 5,
                "name": "Alice Johnson",
                "email": "alice@example.com",
                "role": "team_lead"
            }
        ],
        "lists": [
            {
                "id": 1,
                "name": "To Do"
            },
            {
                "id": 2,
                "name": "In Progress"
            }
        ],
        "created_at": "2025-07-15T09:30:00.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2025-07-15T09:30:00.000000Z"
    }
}

 ```

---

### ❌ Error Responses

| Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `401` | Unauthenticated — token missing or invalid |
| `403` | Forbidden — user is not a member of this board |
| `404` | Board not found |
| `500` | Internal server error |

**401 Unauthenticated:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**403 Forbidden:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "You do not have permission to view this board.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**500 Internal Server Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Something went wrong.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

---

### 📝 Notes

- Returns full board details including members and lists.
    
- Only board members and the creator can view board details.
    
- The `board_id` environment variable should be set after creating or listing boards.

## 🗑️ Delete Board

Permanently deletes a board and all its associated lists, tasks, and comments.

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL |
| --- | --- |
| `DELETE` | `{{base_url}}/boards/{{board_id}}` |

---

### 🔐 Authentication

Requires a valid Bearer token.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

 ```

**Required Role:** `manager`

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `board_id` | integer | The unique ID of the board to delete |

---

### Request Body

No request body required.

---

### ✅ Success Response

**Status Code:** `204 No Content`

> No response body is returned on successful deletion. 
  

---

### ❌ Error Responses

| Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `401` | Unauthenticated — token missing or invalid |
| `403` | Forbidden — user does not have the `manager` role |
| `404` | Board not found |
| `500` | Internal server error |

**401 Unauthenticated:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**403 Forbidden:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "You do not have permission to delete this board.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**500 Internal Server Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Something went wrong.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

---

### 📝 Notes

- ⚠️ **This action is irreversible.** Deleting a board will cascade-delete all associated lists, tasks, comments, and activity logs.
    
- Only users with the `manager` role can delete boards.
    
- A `204 No Content` response with no body is returned on success.

## 👤 Add Member

Adds a user as a member to a specific board with an assigned role.

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL |
| --- | --- |
| `POST` | `{{base_url}}/boards/{{board_id}}/members` |

---

### 🔐 Authentication

Requires a valid Bearer token.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

 ```

**Required Role:** `manager`

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `board_id` | integer | The unique ID of the board |

---

### Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description | Validation Rules |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `user_id` | integer | ✅ Yes | The ID of the user to add | `required`, `integer`, `exists:users,id` |
| `role` | string | ✅ Yes | The role to assign to the member | `required`, `in:manager,team_lead,member` |

**Example Request Body:**

``` json
{
    "user_id": 7,
    "role": "team_lead"
}

 ```

---

### ✅ Success Response

**Status Code:** `201 Created`

``` json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Member added successfully.",
    "data": {
        "id": 12,
        "board_id": 1,
        "user_id": 7,
        "role": "team_lead",
        "user": {
            "id": 7,
            "name": "Bob Martinez",
            "email": "bob@example.com"
        },
        "created_at": "2025-07-15T10:00:00.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2025-07-15T10:00:00.000000Z"
    }
}

 ```

---

### ❌ Error Responses

| Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `401` | Unauthenticated — token missing or invalid |
| `403` | Forbidden — user does not have the `manager` role |
| `422` | Validation error — invalid user ID or role |
| `500` | Internal server error |

**401 Unauthenticated:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**403 Forbidden:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "You do not have permission to add members.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**422 Validation Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Validation failed.",
    "errors": {
        "user_id": ["The selected user id is invalid."],
        "role": ["The selected role is invalid."]
    }
}

 ```

**500 Internal Server Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Something went wrong.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

---

### 📝 Notes

- Valid roles are: `manager`, `team_lead`, `member`.
    
- A user can only be added to a board once. Attempting to add a duplicate member will return a validation error.
    
- Only users with the `manager` role can add members to a board.

## 🔄 Update Member

Updates the role of an existing board member.

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL |
| --- | --- |
| `PUT` | `{{base_url}}/boards/{{board_id}}/members/{{member_id}}` |

---

### 🔐 Authentication

Requires a valid Bearer token.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

 ```

**Required Role:** `manager`

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `board_id` | integer | The unique ID of the board |
| `member_id` | integer | The unique ID of the board member record |

---

### Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description | Validation Rules |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `role` | string | ✅ Yes | The new role to assign to the member | `required`, `in:manager,team_lead,member` |

**Example Request Body:**

``` json
{
    "role": "member"
}

 ```

---

### ✅ Success Response

**Status Code:** `200 OK`

``` json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Member updated successfully.",
    "data": {
        "id": 12,
        "board_id": 1,
        "user_id": 7,
        "role": "member",
        "user": {
            "id": 7,
            "name": "Bob Martinez",
            "email": "bob@example.com"
        },
        "created_at": "2025-07-15T10:00:00.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2025-07-15T12:30:00.000000Z"
    }
}

 ```

---

### ❌ Error Responses

| Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `401` | Unauthenticated — token missing or invalid |
| `403` | Forbidden — user does not have the `manager` role |
| `404` | Member not found on this board |
| `422` | Validation error — invalid role value |
| `500` | Internal server error |

**401 Unauthenticated:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**403 Forbidden:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "You do not have permission to update members.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**422 Validation Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Validation failed.",
    "errors": {
        "role": ["The selected role is invalid."]
    }
}

 ```

**500 Internal Server Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Something went wrong.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

---

### 📝 Notes

- Only the `role` field can be updated for a board member.
    
- Valid roles are: `manager`, `team_lead`, `member`.
    
- Only users with the `manager` role can update member roles.

## 🚫 Delete Member

Removes a member from a board.

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL |
| --- | --- |
| `DELETE` | `{{base_url}}/boards/{{board_id}}/members/{{member_id}}` |

---

### 🔐 Authentication

Requires a valid Bearer token.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

 ```

**Required Role:** `manager`

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `board_id` | integer | The unique ID of the board |
| `member_id` | integer | The unique ID of the board member record |

---

### Request Body

No request body required.

---

### ✅ Success Response

**Status Code:** `204 No Content`

> No response body is returned on successful deletion. 
  

---

### ❌ Error Responses

| Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `401` | Unauthenticated — token missing or invalid |
| `403` | Forbidden — user does not have the `manager` role |
| `404` | Member not found on this board |
| `500` | Internal server error |

**401 Unauthenticated:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**403 Forbidden:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "You do not have permission to remove members.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**500 Internal Server Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Something went wrong.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

---

### 📝 Notes

- Removing a member does not delete their user account — it only removes their access to the board.
    
- Only users with the `manager` role can remove members.
    
- The board creator cannot be removed as a member.

## 👥 Get All Members of Board

Retrieves a list of all members belonging to a specific board.

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL |
| --- | --- |
| `GET` | `{{base_url}}/boards/{{board_id}}/members` |

---

request.description:
## ✅ Add a Task

Creates a new task within a specific list on a board.

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL |
| --- | --- |
| `POST` | `{{base_url}}/boards/{{board_id}}/lists/{{list_id}}/tasks` |

---

### 🔐 Authentication

Requires a valid Bearer token.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

 ```

**Required Role:** `manager` or `team_lead`

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `board_id` | integer | The unique ID of the board |
| `list_id` | integer | The unique ID of the list |

---

### Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description | Validation Rules |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `title` | string | ✅ Yes | The title of the task | `required`, `string`, `max:255` |
| `description` | string | ❌ No | Detailed description of the task | `nullable`, `string` |
| `assigned_to` | integer | ❌ No | User ID of the assignee | `nullable`, `integer`, `exists:users,id` |
| `due_date` | date | ❌ No | The deadline for the task | `nullable`, `date`, `after:today` |
| `priority` | string | ❌ No | Priority level of the task | `nullable`, `in:low,medium,high` |

**Example Request Body:**

``` json
{
    "title": "Design the onboarding flow",
    "description": "Create wireframes and mockups for the new user onboarding experience.",
    "assigned_to": 7,
    "due_date": "2025-08-01",
    "priority": "high"
}

 ```

---

### ✅ Success Response

**Status Code:** `201 Created`

``` json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Task created successfully.",
    "data": {
        "id": 5,
        "board_id": 1,
        "list_id": 2,
        "title": "Design the onboarding flow",
        "description": "Create wireframes and mockups for the new user onboarding experience.",
        "assigned_to": 7,
        "due_date": "2025-08-01",
        "priority": "high",
        "created_by": 3,
        "created_at": "2025-07-15T12:00:00.000000Z",
        "updated_at": "2025-07-15T12:00:00.000000Z"
    }
}

 ```

---

### ❌ Error Responses

| Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `401` | Unauthenticated — token missing or invalid |
| `403` | Forbidden — insufficient role |
| `422` | Validation error — required fields missing or invalid |
| `500` | Internal server error |

**401 Unauthenticated:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**403 Forbidden:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "You do not have permission to create tasks.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**422 Validation Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Validation failed.",
    "errors": {
        "title": ["The title field is required."],
        "due_date": ["The due date must be a date after today."]
    }
}

 ```

**500 Internal Server Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Something went wrong.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

---

### 📝 Notes

- Tasks must belong to a list, which must belong to the specified board.
    
- The `assigned_to` user must be a member of the board.
    
- Valid priority values: `low`, `medium`, `high`.
    
- The `created_by` field is automatically set to the authenticated user's ID.

---

### 🔐 Authentication

```
Authorization: Bearer {{token}}

 ```

---

### URL Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `board_id` | integer | The unique ID of the board |
| `list_id` | integer | The unique ID of the list within the board |
| `task_id` | integer | The unique ID of the task to delete |

---

### Request Body

No request body required.

---

### ✅ Success Response

**Status Code:** `204 No Content`

> No response body is returned on successful deletion.

---

### ❌ Error Responses

| Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `401` | Unauthenticated — token missing or invalid |
| `403` | Forbidden — user does not have permission to delete this task |
| `404` | Board, list, or task not found |
| `500` | Internal server error |

**401 Unauthenticated:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**403 Forbidden:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "You do not have permission to delete this task.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**404 Not Found:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Task not found.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**500 Internal Server Error:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Something went wrong.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

---

### 📝 Notes

- ⚠️ **This action is irreversible.** Deleting a task will also remove all associated comments and activity logs.
    
- The task must belong to the specified list, which must belong to the specified board.
    
- A `204 No Content` response with no body is returned on success.

## 📊 Get Activity Logs

Retrieves a chronological log of all activities performed within the system, such as board creation, task assignments, and member changes.

---

### Endpoint

| Method | URL |
| --- | --- |
| `GET` | `{{base_url}}/logs` |

---

### 🔐 Authentication

Requires a valid Bearer token.

```
Authorization: Bearer {{token}

 ```

---

### Request Body

No request body required.

---

### ✅ Success Response

**Status Code:** `200 OK`

``` json
{
    "status": true,
    "message": "Activity logs retrieved successfully.",
    "data": [
        {
            "id": 1,
            "user_id": 3,
            "action": "created_board",
            "description": "Created board 'Product Launch Q3'",
            "loggable_type": "App\\Models\\Board",
            "loggable_id": 1,
            "user": {
                "id": 3,
                "name": "Sarah Connor"
            },
            "created_at": "2025-07-15T09:30:00.000000Z"
        },
        {
            "id": 2,
            "user_id": 3,
            "action": "added_member",
            "description": "Added Bob Martinez as team_lead to board 'Product Launch Q3'",
            "loggable_type": "App\\Models\\BoardMember",
            "loggable_id": 12,
            "user": {
                "id": 3,
                "name": "Sarah Connor"
            },
            "created_at": "2025-07-15T10:00:00.000000Z"
        },
        {
            "id": 3,
            "user_id": 7,
            "action": "created_task",
            "description": "Created task 'Design the onboarding flow' in list 'In Progress'",
            "loggable_type": "App\\Models\\Task",
            "loggable_id": 5,
            "user": {
                "id": 7,
                "name": "Bob Martinez"
            },
            "created_at": "2025-07-15T12:00:00.000000Z"
        }
    ]
}

 ```

### ❌ Error Responses

| Status Code | Description |
| --- | --- |

**401 Unauthenticated:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Unauthenticated.",
    "errors": {}
}

 ```

**403 Forbidden:**

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "You do not have permission to view activity logs.",
    "errors": {}

 ```

``` json
{
    "status": false,
    "message": "Something went wrong.",
    "errors": {}
}
 ```

### 📝 Notes

- Logs are returned in reverse chronological order (newest first).
    
- Logs are immutable — they cannot be edited or deleted via the API.
    
- The `subject_model` and subject`_id` fields implement Laravel's polymorphic relationships, indicating which model the log entry refers to.
